failures.description: The Executor misinterpreted or ignored the ProductCatalogSearch result showing one matching item above the requested price threshold.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent had relevant tool output before the failure: ProductCatalogSearch returned one available beginner Jigsaw Puzzle priced at 46.13, which is greater than 45.76. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the opposite conclusion, saying no items match. This directly contradicts the tool result and was not resolved later; the Evaluator approved the bad answer and further misread the evidence.
